title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Once per week, students submit an XP
content:
✔ Once per week, students submit an XP Update Form (Physical or Digital).
✔ The form asks them:
• What challenges did you complete?
• What skill checks did you attempt?
• What XP-rewarding actions did you take?
✔ The professor verifies and updates the master XP sheet once a week.

📜 Physical XP Tracking Board in the Classroom
✔ A Leaderboard displays general rankings (not exact XP values).
✔ Students see where they stand but don’t know exact XP numbers of others.
✔ Leaderboard updates happen weekly, adding an element of suspense.

📜 Why This Works:
• Students are responsible for tracking their XP—removing constant oversight.
• Simple once-a-week submission ensures XP is logged correctly.
• Leaderboard gamifies the system without overwhelming in-class time.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 254 (chunk 254/555)
